creator: jhs@berklix.com
text:
Recovery from bit rot

Fix: 

s/MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org/MAINTAINER=	jhs@berklix.com/
	s/jhs@freebsd.org/jhs@freebsd.org = jhs@berklix.com/
	s/phil@gmrs.isar.de/phil@cockcroft.de/
	s/ but changes a lot//

	Then await next dmesg from me as generic source author Phil
	has a newer version he will give me some time.
	PS Phil if you want a FreeBSD login to test, let me know.
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/lang/pbasic ; make fetch

	It fails on 
		ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/trevor/
	Missing directory trevor - who was / why trevor ?

	ftpmaster@freebsd.org
	If you need to make a directory name there in name of person
	with a mail on @freebsd.org, make it local-distfiles/jhs/
	Thanks

	make fetch eventually finds it on
		http://ftp2.ua.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/pbasic-2.0-950813.tar.gz

	MD5 is correct = 7f66af9314727e30c8513e9a98f94e26

	as file has dissappeared on lots of other mirrrors, it
	suggests maybe ukraine mirror is out of date, & when ukraine
	does next mirror, it will disappear there too.
	ftpmaster@freebsd.org you might want to check ukraine status
